task: Shorten VP training session load time after selecting a training case

governance_bootstrap.summary: Code and UI-affecting changes require real verification and completion evidence before completion reporting.
Completion reporting for code and customer-facing flows requires completion evidence guard validation.

changes: Made /api/edu/vp-training/session a read-only load path by removing snapshot writes during case entry.
Removed resume event-log writes from the blocking session load response.
Removed personalized curriculum attachment from the blocking session load response.
Added regression coverage proving the session load path does not call _edu_vp_store_state, _edu_vp_append_event, or _edu_vp_attach_personalized_curriculum.

verification.name: edu app build and lint
verification.command: npm run build --prefix harness-os/edu-app && npm run lint --prefix harness-os/edu-app

verification.name: Mac Mini backend runtime entrypoint
verification.result: passed: backend HTTP service returned the Harness HTML shell

residual_risk: No authenticated browser timing capture was available in this session; regression coverage verifies the blocking session load path no longer performs the removed writes or curriculum attach.
